title: FortMine ++
description: Let's enjoy a new adventure in Minecraft better with FM++
body:
**FortMiners ++** , A better journey in your Minecraft world
# Overview:
**What's FortMine?** Mod Pack in Minecraft adds a large group of mods to you, while improving the game in terms of quality and gameplay for the best experience in the best game in the world.
#
![FM++ Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dd445b79cf3d51ffab4d30bedd0e6c544aefcf1_0.webp)
#

#  What's inside FortMine?

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

**FortMine offers you many mods with great features, +200 Mod**

# Experience mods:

**- Another Furniture** (Some furniture, chairs and other things in vanilla style)

**- Carry On** (Pick up Tile Entities and Mobs and carry them around)

**- Copper Rails** (Add a rails crafts with copper to have most speed)

**- Crawl** (Enter between 1 block with one button)

**- Enderscape** (Overhaul of the End dimension with new generation)

**- Exposure** (Add a camera's like irl craft)

**- Explorify** (Add new structures to explore it)

**- Fabric Seasons** (Add season like winter, summer with time)

**- Friends&Foes** (Add the mobs you lost in Mob vote)

**- Immersive Aircraft** (Add different types of aircraft)

**- Sophisticated Backpacks** (Add a backpack to save more items)

**- Supplementaries** (Add more vanilla additions) 

**- Magic Mirror** (Go back to your spawn point with item)

**- Litematica** (Build and copy any thing you want)

**- WaterFrames** (Add screens where you can play any video or image you want)

  **and more...**

# Peformance mods:

**- Sodium, Sodium Extras, Chunky, Entity Culling, Lithium, More Culling, and more...**

# Auxiliary mods:

**- Better Ping Display, Better Statistics Screen, Clumps, Dynamic Lights, Essential Mod, Freecam, Gamma Utils (Fullbright), Mod Menu, NetherPortalFix, WorldEdit, and more...**

# Visuality mods:

**- Visuality, Wakes, Iris Shaders, Item Borders, ItemPhysic Lite, Explosive Enhancement, Continuity, Eating Animation, Chat Animation, Chat Heads, Better Ladders, and more...**



</details>


<details>
<summary>Known Bugs</summary>

# What is a bugs?: 

There are some problems in the pack, and this is very normal because it is in its beginning.

# If you find a bug:

If you find any bugs or problems, contact us on our [Discord Server (Click to join)](https://discord.gg/RBuNE5fZdM) We will respond to you and solve your problems with the mod pack as soon as possible.

# Controls problems:

We haven't modified the controls in the mod pack yet, so it's best for you to do it yourself until later. Just go to Minecraft settings, then controls, then modify the buttons to the best settings for you.




</details>

# The basic idea:

Improving Minecraft for the best possible experience with mods for adventure and fun, and focusing a lot on the multiplayer mode because it is the main mode.

#


![A picture take it with freecam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31a4e5410971bda03e48d7997846867f9b20e428.png)

#

More stuff will be added to the **FM++ modpack** in the future! Stay tuned for future updates for the best possible experience.
